artPrompt: A tidy column of marching townsfolk and small voter figures advancing across a sunlit town green, blank placards held high and a roped permitted route, golden afternoon light glowing on their determined faces, picket fences and folding tables hazing behind in leafy green and ivory, the orderly march pulsing with restrained fervor, tender and resolute, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Orderly Protest
text: Up to two target Voters or Citizens you control each get +2/+2 and gain trample until end of turn. (They stayed in the permitted area the whole time, thank you very much.)
flavorText: The chant rhymed. The route was approved. The mayor's nap was, regrettably, interrupted on schedule.
